tests.name: assertConfiguredModelPresent hard-fails when configured model is missing
runRepoSearch does not fail on model inventory mismatch
repo-search executes a native web_search tool when allowed
runTaskLoop rewrites mixed rg --type ts and --type tsx flags
runTaskLoop executes simple rg directly and preserves mixed quote regex
runTaskLoop rewrites rg --include and annotates output
runTaskLoop counts rg syntax failures and gives planner guidance
runTaskLoop reports prompt tokens and elapsed time on command progress events
runTaskLoop tool_result outputTokens reflects the fitted bubble output
runTaskLoop logs fitted tool result truncation in the full inserted output
runTaskLoop replaces long repeated tool output before inserting it into context
runTaskLoop does not replay final output as thinking progress
runTaskLoop reuses preflight prompt token count for tool progress and allowance
runTaskLoop executes repo_list_files and repo_read_file natively
runTaskLoop executes repo_list_files at repository root natively
runTaskLoop executes repo_list_files with runner-* glob natively
runTaskLoop logs provider request error details and surfaces enriched network failures
runTaskLoop rewrites mixed --type jsx and --type tsx to --type js and --type ts
runTaskLoop counts non-zero command exits as command failures but not invalid responses
runTaskLoop does not count rg exit code 1 (no matches) as a command failure
runTaskLoop does not count grep exit code 1 (no matches) as a command failure
runTaskLoop still counts exit code 1 from non-search commands as a command failure
runTaskLoop stops on finish action
runTaskLoop executes tool batches sequentially and counts each tool call toward finish depth
runTaskLoop accepts corroborated finish before minimum tool-call depth
runTaskLoop stops at max turns when model keeps asking for tools
runTaskLoop prompt omits visible tool-call budget counters
runTaskLoop records line-read stats for Get-Content windows
runTaskLoop rewrites Get-ChildItem recurse command to include ignore excludes
runTaskLoop rewrites Select-String path scan to include ignore excludes
runTaskLoop rejects Get-Content reads under ignored directories
runTaskLoop sends append-only chat requests with explicit cache_prompt and a pinned slot
runTaskLoop keeps one duplicate warning tool turn and forces finish on the fifth duplicate
runTaskLoop synthesizes final output on terminal max_turns
runTaskLoop uses dynamic max_tokens for planner requests from live prompt budget
runTaskLoop uses dynamic max_tokens for terminal synthesis requests
runTaskLoop assigns a unique toolCallId pairing tool_start with tool_result

candidates.deleteName: runTaskLoop reports prompt tokens and elapsed time on command progress events
